issue_title: fix(ui): daily timesheet layout selector & actions buttons UI
issue_body_preview:
# PR

- [x] Have you followed the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/ever-co/ever-gauzy/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md)?
- [x] Have you explained what your changes do, and why they add value?

**Please note: we will close your PR without comment if you do not check the boxes abov
test_description_zh: 打开每日时间表页面，观察布局选择器（列表/网格视图切换）和操作按钮的显示位置、对齐方式和样式，尝试点击布局选择器切换视图，并点击各操作按钮验证其交互响应。
expected_result_zh: 布局选择器和操作按钮在页面中正确对齐、无错位或样式异常，切换布局时视图正常更新，操作按钮可正常点击且功能响应正确。
